//1: Template for .claude/settings.json — TRACK THIS FILE IN GIT (add `!.claude/settings.json` to .gitignore after the `.claude/*` ignore). Personal grants go in settings.local.json (gitignored).
//2: ALLOW list: auto-approve ONLY tools that are read-only AT THE SOURCE — e.g. a database MCP connector configured with a read-only role (Supabase: add ?read_only=true to the connector URL; then VERIFY with a write probe and watch the database refuse it). Never blanket-allow a tool that CAN write just because you mostly read with it.
//3: ASK list: every write-capable tool prompts, every time. One convenient 'always allow' click on a write tool becomes a permanent silent grant.
//4: Replace <READONLY_CONNECTOR> / <FULL_CONNECTOR> with your MCP server tool prefixes. NOTE: hosted-connector prefixes are per-connection hashes — if you re-add a connector, the hash changes and this list silently stops matching (it fails safe: prompts return). Re-check after any connector change.
